sections.description: Internal Kingdom tool for managing Sermons, Events, and Calendar views (with recurrence).
sections.changelog:
0.5.0

  • Updated Sermons List logic so limit now controls the maximum total sermons displayed, while per_page controls pagination within that limit.
  • Updated Events List logic so limit now controls the maximum total events displayed, while per_page controls pagination within that limit.
  • Fixed Sermons List behavior where Elementor widget settings could cause per_page to override the intended total limit.
  • Fixed Events List behavior so pagination no longer exceeds the configured total limit.
  • Added calendar list controls for Elementor, including List Limit and List Per Page.
  • Updated Events Calendar widget to pass list limit and pagination settings into the calendar output.
  • Enhanced the calendar month view so the event list below the calendar supports limit and per-page pagination.
  • Improved calendar behavior so the month grid still shows all event days, while only the list below follows the configured limit and pagination.
  • Added front-end pagination controls for the calendar month event list.
  • Updated pagination styling so active pagination buttons can follow KMM Appearance button color settings.
  • Improved pagination consistency across Sermons List, Events List, and Calendar event list outputs.
  • Refined shortcode behavior for better alignment between shortcode settings and Elementor widget settings.
  • Improved overall front-end consistency between KMM appearance settings and paginated outputs.

0.4.0

  • Added Elementor widgets for Sermon Single, Sermons List, Latest Sermon, Events Calendar, Events List, and Event Single.
  • Added support for KMM styles and assets to load properly inside the Elementor builder and preview.
  • Expanded appearance settings so theme presets and custom styling apply more consistently across sermon and event outputs.
  • Added body text color support to appearance settings.
  • Improved Latest Sermon and Event views to follow appearance typography and color settings more reliably.
  • Improved Event Single output to properly respect show_title and show_body settings.
  • Fixed dynamic appearance CSS variables so preset and custom styles load correctly on live pages and in Elementor.
  • Cleaned up frontend asset registration for shortcode and Elementor widget compatibility.
  • Removed duplicate event content rendering in Event Single output.
  • Cleaned up sermon meta field handling.

0.3.6

  • Added pagination on Events list and Sermons list.

Earlier Versions

  • Earlier versions were internal development releases and did not have formal changelog records.
